Ich erwarte jedoch, dass die Schlussgenehmigung durch eine Generalversammlung erfolgt." (Regarding the circular of the 7th of this month, I respectfully inform you that the exposé is completely sufficient for me and that I agree if further negotiations with the B.R.S.A.G. are undertaken. However, I expect that the final approval will take place through a general assembly.)
*   **Closing:** "Mit vorzüglicher Hochachtung:" (With highest regards).
